report.summary: Hourly delta check: build + design + publish cycles closed overnight; site steady, no blockers flagged.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic steady hour-over-hour; no anomaly spikes vs last cycle
Top pages unchanged: DCA calculator, stablecoin yields, restaking guide
No new keywords breaking into top-10 since last standup
Search Console data lag (~24h) — next meaningful delta expected tomorrow AM

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Last cycle completed: build (04:20), design (03:30), publish (02:47)
Carry-over: none flagged as blocked in recent reports
Open items: monitor publish queue depth, continue daily rollout cadence
No incidents or broken-page alerts in reports/ folder

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. Keep publish queue flowing — promote next batch on schedule
2. Validate build output from 04:20 cycle is live and indexable
3. Watch for Search Console refresh — flag any ranking regressions
